base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tellah — a character (playable) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Tellah — elder Sage, ultimate-magic user. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tellah — elder Sage, ultimate-magic user; Meteor-cast sacrifice
